title: Gooey Middle Eastern Scamorza Labneh
description: A nutty and gooey Middle Eastern dish featuring scamorza cheese, served in a scallop shell and made with ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly ingredients, this labneh is a show-off dish for any occasion.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a blender or food processor, combine labneh cheese, pistachio meal, olive oil, garlic, sumac, salt, and black pepper, and blend until smooth.
Cut the scamorza cheese into small pieces and add to the blender or food processor, blending until well combined and gooey.
Spoon the mixture into the scallop shells, filling them about 3/4 of the way full.
Place the filled scallop shells on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the scallop shells from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Serve the gooey Middle Eastern scamorza labneh hot, garnished with additional sumac and pistachio meal if desired.
